name: Essex Single Storage Ottoman - Threshold™
description:
Add extra seating to any room of your home with the Essex Single Storage Ottoman from Threshold™. Functional and stylish, this upholstered storage ottoman features a classic rectangular silhouette that's wrapped up in soft fabric upholstery with ample padding on the seat for extra comfort and support. Made with a solid wooden frame, this rectangular storage ottoman features a hinged top that opens up to a convenient storage compartment, giving you the perfect solution for your storage needs. This rectangular ottoman blends well with your contemporary-styled decor and works as a great decorative accent to add to your space. Use it in the living room as a footrest and to store board games and magazines, or keep it in your entryway as a comfortable place to sit while you change your shoes.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.

Overall Width: 24 inches
Overall Height: 18 inches
Overall Depth: 17 inches
Storage Width: 22 inches
Storage Depth: 15 inches
Storage Height: 11.5 inches
